steps.title: Compare the blink findings
steps.content: The previous sentence says slow blinks were associated with shorter speaking times. The sentence after the blank says quicker blinks were associated with longer speaking times. Those findings point in opposite directions.

steps.title: Choose a contrast transition
steps.content: A would introduce an example, but the second finding is not an example of the first. B would introduce a more specific version of the same idea, which does not fit. C would start a sequence, but the text is comparing two findings. The transition must signal contrast. The answer is D.
